# Trackables

> Trackables is a web app for creating shareable forms, collecting structured responses, and tracking API usage events.

## What the site does
- Create trackable items for forms, surveys, and usage tracking.
- Share forms with a public link, named users, or specific email addresses.
- Collect structured responses from shared forms.
- Record API usage events with API keys and attached metadata.
- Review submissions and usage history in an authenticated dashboard.

## Public pages
- Home: https://trackables.org/
- Terms of Service: https://trackables.org/terms
- Privacy Statement: https://trackables.org/privacy

## Discovery
- Sitemap: https://trackables.org/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://trackables.org/robots.txt
- Security: https://trackables.org/security.txt

## Source
- GitHub: https://github.com/JeremyMColegrove/trackable

## Crawling guidance
- The public marketing and legal pages are indexable.
- Sign-in, sign-up, dashboard, API, and tokenized shared form routes are not part of the public index.
